metadata.title: Circle In The Sand (Beach Party Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:23.04] Sundown all around
[00:26.64] Walking through the summer's end
[00:30.78] Waves crash, baby, don't look back
[00:34.54] I won't walk away again
[00:38.31] Oh, baby, anywhere you go,
[00:43.97] We are bound together
[00:46.02] I begin, baby, where you end
[00:49.62] Somethings are forever
[00:54.54] Circle in the sand
[00:56.56] Round and round
[00:58.47] Never ending love is what we've found
[01:02.99] And you complete the heart of me
[01:06.58] Our love is all we need
[01:09.72] Circle in the sand
[01:18.22] Cold wind, tide moves in
[01:22.18] Shivers in the salty air
[01:25.98] Day breaks, my heart aches
[01:29.50] I will wait for you right here
[01:33.60] Oh baby when you look for me
[01:38.96] Can you see forever?
[01:41.33] I begin, baby, where you end
[01:44.76] We belong together
[01:49.82] Circle in the sand
[01:52.15] Round and round
[01:53.65] Rising of the moon as the sun goes down
[01:57.98] And you complete the heart of me
[02:02.07] Our love is all we need
[02:04.96] Circle in the sand
[02:09.07] Circle in the sand
[02:16.56] Baby can you hear me?
[02:22.62] Can you hear me calling?
[02:51.91] Oh baby anywhere you go
[02:57.25] We are bound together
[02:59.34] And I begin baby where you end
[03:03.08] Some things are forever
[03:11.55] Circle in the sand
[03:13.69] Round and round
[03:15.32] Never ending love is what we've found
[03:19.88] And you complete the heart of me
[03:23.93] Our love is all we need
